name: PER_SENIORITY_DATES
description: This is transactional table for storing seniority dates.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE_ID
columns.Comments: This is unique Id for Seniority Date Item

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE_CODE
columns.Comments: This Code is used to identify the Seniority Date Item.

columns.Name: TRIGGERING_FIELD_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This is the field on which the Seniority Date is defined.

columns.Name: TRIGGERING_FIELD_DATE
columns.Comments: TRIGGERING_FIELD_DATE

columns.Name: TRIGGERING_FIELD_TEXT
columns.Comments: Stores seniority attributes like LegislationCode which is of type text.

columns.Name: TRIGGERING_FIELD
columns.Comments: Lookup code for the Triggering Field.

columns.Name: LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup code for the Levels.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE
columns.Comments:
Actual Seniority date value will be stored in this field.
User can override the value in this field.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is Mandatory Field and it stores Person Id.

columns.Name: LEVEL_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: LEVEL_OBJECT_ID

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_COMMENT
columns.Comments: OVERRIDE_COMMENT

columns.Name: DEFAULTED_SENIORITY_DATE
columns.Comments: The Seniority Date value, when the the seniority record is first created. Even if user overrides Seniority Date this value will not change.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
